title: Peppery Peruvian Dum Noodles
description: A quick one-pot Peruvian dish featuring tender rice stick noodles, spicy paprika, and fresh lime for a peppery, juicy kick.

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.notes: smoked paprika for extra peppery depth

instructions: Cook rice stick noodles according to package directions in a large pot of salted water.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat, add minced garlic and red bell pepper, sauté for 2 minutes until tender.
Add smoked paprika to the pan and stir for 30 seconds to release flavor.
Combine cooked noodles with the pan mixture, toss gently to coat.
Add fresh lime juice and mix lightly to enhance freshness.
Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper to taste, serve immediately.
